/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=12.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/xcm_tui.dir/src/html_tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_tui.dir/src/css_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_tui.dir/src/style_resolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_tui.dir/src/layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_tui.dir/src/paint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_tui.dir/src/xcm_tui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_tui.dir/src/xcm_tuiapp.cpp.o -o xcm_tui
